hero.tagline: Error tracking for modern teams — and crypto-native ones
hero.title: Catch errors before your customers do.
hero.subtitle: Real-time issue tracking with source-mapped stack traces, deep auto-breadcrumb timelines, and smart alerts. First-class SDKs across the JS, JVM, and Python ecosystems plus a Web3 add-on that decodes wallet, chain, and contract errors from viem, ethers, Solana, and Anchor — same wire format end-to-end so a polyglot stack groups into one issue.

features.heading: Everything you need, nothing you don't.
features.subheading: Built on the same multi-tenant stack we run in production. Same DSN format and SDK shape as Sentry — drop-in for most existing setups.

ingest.title: Real-time ingest
ingest.body: Events flow through a Redis Streams queue with at-least-once delivery semantics. Issues are deduplicated by stable fingerprints in milliseconds.

sourcemaps.title: Source-mapped stack traces
sourcemaps.body: Upload source maps per release through the CLI. Frames are symbolicated by the worker so your team sees real file paths, not minified gibberish.

breadcrumbs.title: Auto-breadcrumb timeline
breadcrumbs.body: Browser SDK auto-instruments console, fetch, XHR, navigation, clicks, web vitals, long tasks, and worker errors. Every issue lands with the lead-up rendered as a coloured timeline so the cause reads at a glance.

web3.title: Web3 — first-class
web3.body: viem, ethers v6, @solana/web3.js, Anchor, wagmi, and WalletConnect errors decoded into rich tags: chain, wallet, contract, function, args, decoded revert reason / Anchor error / custom program code. One initWeb3() wires the lot.

alerts.title: Multi-channel alerts
alerts.body: Telegram, Slack, email, and generic webhooks out of the box. Per-rule throttling and DSL-driven matching on level, tags, and first-seen windows.

team.title: Team workflows
team.body: Owner / admin / member roles, invite flows with email verification, scoped Personal Access Tokens for CI and scripts, full RFC 9457 problem responses.

platforms.heading: First-class SDKs
platforms.subheading: Drop-in clients for browser, mobile, and server runtimes — including a zero-dependency Python SDK, a Spring Boot autoconfig, and a Web3 add-on you layer on top of any JS SDK. The catalog below is fetched live from /api/v1/platforms, the same endpoint the dashboard uses.
platforms.fallback: Visit the GitHub repo for the SDK list.

web3Card.title: Web3 add-on
web3Card.description: EVM (viem + ethers + wagmi + WalletConnect) and Solana (web3.js + Anchor + wallet adapter) error decoding. Layers on top of @arguslog/sdk-browser.

pricing.heading: Pricing that scales with you.
pricing.subheading: Start free. Upgrade when your event volume justifies it. Pay with a card via Lemon Squeezy or in stablecoins (USDT / USDC). Bundles for 1, 3, 6 and 12 months with a -17% / -25% / -33% discount ladder — no auto-renew, no surprise charges.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Dedicated infrastructure, SAML/OIDC SSO, contracted SLA, custom retention windows, and a named support channel. Talk to us about volumes, compliance scope, and rollout.

pricing.annualNote: Crypto and card both. Stablecoin checkout settles in seconds via NOWPayments; cards via Lemon Squeezy (Merchant of Record — invoices and EU VAT handled for you). Switch tiers any time from the billing page.

footer.tagline: Open-source error tracking, hosted on Railway. EVM + Solana aware.
